title: Royalford Marble Finish Vacuum Flask 1900ml | Double Wall Insulated Coffee Carafe | Thermal Jug for Hot & Cold Drinks | Leak-Proof Lightweight Easy Clean Durable & Stylish Portable Flask for Daily Use

✅ KEEPS DRINKS HOT OR COLD – Soup flask's double wall insulation maintains the temperature of your beverages for hours, so you can enjoy them just the way you like. Coffee flask is perfect for busy mornings, picnics, or long travel days.

✅ SAFE & HEALTHY INNER LINING – The pink glass inner in water flask is completely asbestos-free and food-safe. Small thermos keeps your drinks fresh, clean, and free from any metallic taste, ensuring every sip is pure and healthy.

✅ LEAK-PROOF & EASY TO CARRY – Vacuum flasks Comes with a tight lid that prevents spills, even when travelling. Lightweight and portable— drink flask is ideal for work, trips, or outdoor use, giving you worry-free hydration anywhere.

✅ EASY TO CLEAN & LONG-LASTING – Simply rinse thermos flasks after each use and wipe dry. Built to last with a strong body, travel flask handles everyday use with ease, saving you time and effort in daily maintenance.
description: Product Description Royalford Marble Vacuum Flask Double Walled 1900ML Royalford Thermo Jug is an essential travel and household item and is a handy tool for enjoying drinks in hot and cold seasons. It is suitable for office, school, sports routines and traveling. The body is made from marble for ultra-stylish look, with glass inner pot. It gives the bottle an elegant touch and is super effective in maintaining the internal temperature. With the open mouth style, you can put ice cubes inside with ease. It is super easy to clean, therefore you can leave the cleaning to the washer and get is ready to be used. HEAT, COLD RETENTION & PORTABLE, LEAK RESISTANT The vacuum insulation technology locks in temperature to preserve flavour and freshness, that keeps beverages hot or cold for long hours. This vacuum airpot has a compact streamline design and is lightweight. It has a tight lid that fits perfectly and prevents any liquid from falling. It is leak-proof and is safe to be put in a travel bag. PRESERVES FLAVOR AND FRESHNESS This thermal flask is safe to put your drinks inside it. It maintains the flavor and retains the original freshness of the drink. You can enjoy the same warm or cold cup of your favorite drink at its best flavor. HIGH-QUALITY VACUUM INSULATION This marble designed airpot has double wall insulation with a with glass inner vacuum inside. It has an insulation lid which prevents the heat from escaping out or entering in. This way it maintains a constant temperature inside and keeps the liquid hot or cold. KEEPS DRINKS HOT OR COLD FOR HOURS, 1900ML CAPACITY Depending on the type of drink you have put in, this thermo jug preserves the drink and keeps it hot or cold. You can enjoy a juice, tea or hot coffee even after hours with the same warmth or icy freshness. The 1900ml capacity can serve more people at once. Now enjoy your favorite drink on the go!
